mapper.sql: id, invoice_id, invoice_no, poNo, poItemNo, order_no, split_item_no, item_no, full_order_no, model_no, quantity, price, currency, ship_date, ship_method, case_no, barcode, en_name, weight, supplier_code, create_time, update_time, order_type, remark, remarkII, status, product_code, roHS_code, origin, from_code, shelf_code, update_user, create_user, imp_order_no, customs_fee, from_id, imp_model_no, oversea_invoice_no, nonCommercial, excise_tax, other_fee, trans_fee, po_warehouseCode, vat_fee, sn_code, Amount
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.Imp_invoice_detail_temp
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.Imp_invoice_detail_temp (id, invoice_id, invoice_no, poNo, poItemNo, order_no, split_item_no, item_no, full_order_no, model_no, quantity, price, currency, ship_date, ship_method, case_no, barcode, en_name, weight, supplier_code, create_time, update_time, order_type, remark, remarkII, status, product_code, roHS_code, origin, from_code, shelf_code, update_user, create_user, imp_order_no, customs_fee, from_id, imp_model_no, oversea_invoice_no, nonCommercial, excise_tax, other_fee, trans_fee, po_warehouseCode, vat_fee, sn_code, Amount) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{poitemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{splitItemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fullOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{currency,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{shipMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{caseNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{orderType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{remarkii,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rohsCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{origin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fromCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{shelfCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{impOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customsFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{fromId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{impModelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{overseaInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{noncommercial,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{exciseTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{poWarehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vatFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{snCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL})

mapper.update:
update dbo.Imp_invoice_detail_temp
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_id = #{record.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
poNo = #{record.pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
poItemNo = #{record.poitemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
split_item_no = #{record.splitItemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
item_no = #{record.itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
full_order_no = #{record.fullOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
currency = #{record.currency,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ship_date = #{record.shipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ship_method = #{record.shipMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
case_no = #{record.caseNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
barcode = #{record.barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
en_name = #{record.enName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
weight = #{record.weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
supplier_code = #{record.supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
order_type = #{record.orderType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
remarkII = #{record.remarkii,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
product_code = #{record.productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
roHS_code = #{record.rohsCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
origin = #{record.origin,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_code = #{record.fromCode,jdbcType=CHAR},
shelf_code = #{record.shelfCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
imp_order_no = #{record.impOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customs_fee = #{record.customsFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
from_id = #{record.fromId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
imp_model_no = #{record.impModelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
oversea_invoice_no = #{record.overseaInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nonCommercial = #{record.noncommercial,jdbcType=CHAR},
excise_tax = #{record.exciseTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
other_fee = #{record.otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
trans_fee = #{record.transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
po_warehouseCode = #{record.poWarehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
vat_fee = #{record.vatFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
sn_code = #{record.snCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Amount = #{record.amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},

update dbo.Imp_invoice_detail_temp
invoice_id = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
poNo = #{pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
poItemNo = #{poitemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
split_item_no = #{splitItemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
item_no = #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
full_order_no = #{fullOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
currency = #{currency,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ship_date = #{shipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ship_method = #{shipMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
case_no = #{caseNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
barcode = #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
en_name = #{enName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
supplier_code = #{supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
order_type = #{orderType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
remarkII = #{remarkii,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
product_code = #{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
roHS_code = #{rohsCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
origin = #{origin,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_code = #{fromCode,jdbcType=CHAR},
shelf_code = #{shelfCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
imp_order_no = #{impOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customs_fee = #{customsFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
from_id = #{fromId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
imp_model_no = #{impModelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
oversea_invoice_no = #{overseaInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nonCommercial = #{noncommercial,jdbcType=CHAR},
excise_tax = #{exciseTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
other_fee = #{otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
trans_fee = #{transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
po_warehouseCode = #{poWarehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
vat_fee = #{vatFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
sn_code = #{snCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Amount = #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.Imp_invoice_detail_temp set invoice_id = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, poNo = #{pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, poItemNo = #{poitemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, split_item_no = #{splitItemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, item_no = #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, full_order_no = #{fullOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, currency = #{currency,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ship_date = #{shipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ship_method = #{shipMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, case_no = #{caseNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, barcode = #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, en_name = #{enName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, supplier_code = #{supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, order_type = #{orderType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, remarkII = #{remarkii,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, product_code = #{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, roHS_code = #{rohsCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, origin = #{origin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, from_code = #{fromCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, shelf_code = #{shelfCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, imp_order_no = #{impOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customs_fee = #{customsFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, from_id = #{fromId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, imp_model_no = #{impModelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, oversea_invoice_no = #{overseaInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nonCommercial = #{noncommercial,jdbcType=CHAR}, excise_tax = #{exciseTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, other_fee = #{otherFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, trans_fee = #{transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, po_warehouseCode = #{poWarehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, vat_fee = #{vatFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, sn_code = #{snCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Amount = #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
